title: Read source files and commit code review markdown in one job
job:
Do TWO things in ONE commit:

1. Read all files in plugins/dev-department/src/ and plugins/dev-department/paperclip-plugin.json

2. Create plugins/dev-department/reviews/round2-code-review.md with a code review. Include:
- Verdict: APPROVE or REQUEST CHANGES
- Check if typed maps are used (no Map<string,any>)
- Check if cascade deletes exist
- Check if UI imports PhaseList component
- Check if ConversationRefs is wired into PhaseDetail
- Check if sidebar and tab are differentiated
- Any remaining issues
- Phase 2 readiness assessment

Both reading the code AND creating the review file must happen in the same job. Commit the review file.
